content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学预计于10月20日08:00~11:00（UTC+8）进行校内设施维护。
       维护结束后需要重新登入并更新资源，补给物资将会通过信件向守密人发放。若有任何疑问，欢迎通过校区内客服中心咨询，感谢您的理解与支持！
    
【补给物资】
停服维护补偿：银芯×200、无垢之芯×5
     
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年11月3日09:00。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。
 
【更新内容】
一、活动
【角色活动：波吕克斯】
● 在 10 月 20 日 9:00 - 11 月 17 日 9:00 期间，以下唤醒活动限时开放！
    ○ 角色活动唤醒「圣心涤世」：超维界域攻击型唤醒体「波吕克斯」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒「回还歧路」：命轮「扭曲的骑士诗」。
    ○ 试玩活动「圣子·白夜」：试用「波吕克斯」。
    ○ 角色活动唤醒「漆黑之羽」：超维界域防御型唤醒体「卡斯托尔」。
    ○ 命轮活动唤醒「顽心如石」：命轮「不可承受的自由 」。
    ○ 试玩活动「圣子·黑羽」：试用「卡斯托尔」。
● 在 10 月 20 日 9:00 - 11 月 3 日 9:00 期间，玩法活动「极昼的终夜」开放！
    ○ 活动限定奖励： 命轮「圣子尊容」、头像「以银钥之名：波吕克斯」。
    ○ 活动期间异梦视界「天边之外·下」免费解锁开启！
 
【异梦视界：天边之外·下】
● 「异梦视界」新增篇章「天边之外·下」！
    ○ 当匕首刺进胸口，鸟儿能否继续鸣唱凄婉的歌谣？若光明早已污染，洁白的心是否还能寻回最初的拥抱？飞翔吧，飞翔吧，愿这残缺的翅膀，带你们飞向绯红的朝阳。
● 通关后，即可获得全新钥令「泣血的圣心」。
    ○ 抽 1 张牌并使其算力消耗-1，如果抽到指令卡，额外则使其拥有者获得 25% 临时暴击伤害。波吕克斯：获得 5 层「罪印」。
● 推荐先通关异梦视界「天边之外·上」以获得最佳体验。
 
【角色活动复刻：塔薇】
    ○ 在 11 月 3 日 9:00 - 12 月 1 日 9:00 期间，以下唤醒活动复刻限时开放！
        ■ 「三相衡生」角色活动复刻唤醒，活动期间可任意切换以下角色活动唤醒之一。
            ● 「万物归一」：混沌界域辅助型唤醒体「塔薇」。
            ● 「深囚夙愿」：深海界域防御型唤醒体「墨菲」。
            ● 「高杯盛筵」：血肉界域伤害型唤醒体「索蕾尔」。
            ● 活动期间以上唤醒体试玩活动同步开放。
        ■ 「因果苗圃」命轮活动复刻唤醒，活动期间可任意切换以下命轮活动唤醒之一。
            ● 「跨越银扉」：命轮「隐世的转轮」。
            ● 「虚幻荣宠」：命轮「隐秘的诞生」。
            ● 「欲血横流」：命轮「以蔷薇之名」。
    ○ 在 11 月 3 日 9:00 - 11 月 17 日 9:00  期间，玩法活动「万象门扉」限时开放！
        ■ 活动限定奖励：命轮「真理之门」、头像「以银钥之名：塔薇」。
        ■ 拥有唤醒体「塔薇」、命轮「隐世的转轮」、命轮「真理之门」可大幅提高活动攻略效率！

【幻衣活动：不发糖就捣蛋】
    ○ 在 10 月 20 日 9:00 - 12 月 15 日 9:00 期间，幻衣活动「不发糖就捣蛋」限时开放！
        ■ 墨菲全新 4 ☆ 幻衣「糖果劫案」登场！
            ● 诡异的烛火，欢闹的夜宴，狩猎糖果的小小女巫，于幽灵环绕下盛大登场！
            ● 「打劫！把太妃糖、巧克力、奶糖、水果软糖……咳咳！总之把所有的糖果——全部给我装起来！」
            ● 「你说棉花糖装起来不方便？呜……拿给我，我现在就把它们消灭掉！」
            ● 该幻衣包含全新制作的动态立绘、语音、战斗模组与技能特效！
        ■ 活动期间购买「怪味南瓜糖」可抽取以下物品，首次抽取免费！
            ● 一等奖：4 ☆ 幻衣「糖果劫案」。从第 5 次抽取始有机会获得。
            ● 二等奖：「流明之芯」×15、「银芯」×3000、「精粹原初灵核」×1。
            ● 三等奖：「流明之芯」×5、「银芯」×1000、「群星余梦」×25、「碎裂余梦」×100、「原初灵核」×1、「蔷薇金券」×1000000。
            ● 第 2-10 次抽取分别需要「怪味南瓜糖」×1/2/2/3/5/5/5/5/5 ，每颗「怪味南瓜糖」可以通过「源液」×60 购买。已抽取的奖品不会再次出现在后续抽取结果中。
 
【命轮纪行：铭刻的启程】
● 在 10 月 20 日 9:00 - 11 月 3 日 9:00 期间，命轮纪行「铭刻的启程」限时开放！
    ○ 完成所有免费纪行任务累计可免费获得：SSR 命轮「开学日」×4。
    ○ 购买进阶纪行需要「源液」×980。购买后，完成所有进阶纪行任务累计可额外获得：「开学日」×12、「流明之芯」×25。
 
【预购纪行：渊海胎动】
● 在 11 月 3 日 9:00 - 12 月 15 日 9:00 期间，预购纪行「渊海胎动」限时开放！
    ○ 购买纪行需要「源液」×1980。购买后，随着日期解锁累计可额外获得：「银芯」×20000、「流明之芯」×30、「原型视界」×1、「循环母版」×1、「群星余梦」×25、「碎裂余梦」×100。
    ○ 在 11 月 17 日 9:00 前购买还可额外获得：专属奖励纪念头像「深海的哀歌」、「无形者的请柬」×10！
 
【学园活动：第 24 期】
● 在 10 月 20 日 9:00 - 11 月 17 日 9:00 期间，以下学园活动限时开放！
    ○ 累计登录 7 天即可领取「流明之芯」×10 的丰厚奖励！累计登录 28 天可获得其他奖励！
    ○ 本期核心课题限定奖励：头像「呆呆档案照：泰旖丝」、头像「呆呆档案照：索蕾尔」、头像「呆呆档案照：萨尔瓦多」、头像「永不褪色的昨天：珈伦」、头像「永不褪色的昨天：莉莉」、头像「永不褪色的昨天：诺缔拉」。
    ○ 本期相位对弈限定奖励：表情「课余时间篇：宁菲亚·起床」、表情「比心弥萨格：阿格里帕·比心」、表情「比心弥萨格：索蕾尔·比心」、表情「弥萨格日常：诺缔拉·忘了」。
 
【精选礼盒：全新升级】
● 10 月 20 日 9:00 ~11 月 1 日 9:00 期间，以下精选礼盒上架。
    ○ 「月距遥感」内含：「流明之芯」×20，「拟态凝晶」×300，购买需要「源液」×888，最多购买 10 次。
    ○ 「辐射监测」内含：「流明之芯」×40，「无垢之芯」×40，购买需要「源液」×1888，最多购买 5 次。
    ○ 「潮位巡查」内含：「流明之芯」×60，「贤者之石」×5，购买需要「源液」×2888，最多购买 3 次。
● 后续以上精选礼盒将在每月 1 日 9:00 更新重置。
● 此前跟角色玩法活动同步更新的980、1980、3280源液精选礼盒后续将不再更新。同时，对此前购买了这些精选礼盒的守密人，我们将追溯购买消耗的源液总量，在更新后 48 小时内以邮件形式补发等量的银芯，请守密人注意查收。

二、战斗
【唤醒体强化】
● 唤醒体「塔薇」
    ○ 天赋「灵塑适性」：塔薇打出原本所属为队伍其他唤醒体的卡牌时，对应唤醒体本回合造成的最终伤害、护盾、生命回复提高 15%~25%，无法叠加。
● 唤醒体「索蕾尔」
    ○ 狂气爆发「权欲轮舞」：基础伤害次数由 5 提高为 6。
    ○ 蔷薇之美：移除 50% 生命额外生效 1 次的限制，伤害次数从 2 提高为 4 ，回复生命翻倍。
    ○ 天赋「灵塑适性」：索蕾尔「吞噬」后获得攻击力 15%~30% 的临时力量，每回合最多触发 5 次。
● 唤醒体「汀克特」
    ○ 启灵 1「响彻星穹」：基础打击跃迁效果简化为额外造成 1 次伤害，而非改为造成 1 次 3 倍伤害。
    ○ 启灵 2「午夜哀歌」：基础防御跃迁效果简化为额外造成 1 次狂气，不再减少护盾次数。
    ○ 安魂曲：跃迁效果偷取力量由 30% 攻击力提高为 35% 攻击力。
    ○ 天赋「灵塑适性」：打出「绵音渐响」后，使所有「人型」敌人造成的伤害临时降低 10%~20%，无法叠加。「安魂曲」每驱散一个负面状态，就获得 5~15 点狂气。
● 唤醒体「卡茜亚」
    ○ 超限爆发「纵情欢笑」：获取的力量效果由 4% 攻击力提高为 8% 攻击力，但生效的指令卡数量由 10 降低为 5。
    ○ 隔空取物：跃迁效果合并至基础效果。
    ○ 启灵 3「模仿犯」：重做，原效果合并至基础效果。新效果：隔空取物获得「余波」：将 1 张「灵感」洗入抽牌堆。
    ○ 天赋「灵塑适性」：战斗开始时，若存在「野兽」敌人，「卡茜亚」本场战斗造成的力量提高 15%~35%。「统统消失」每回合首次释放后，触发洗入抽牌堆卡牌的余波效果。
● 唤醒体「宁菲亚」
    ○ 启灵 2「无声浸润」：目前打出「症状」的加成值不再随着「夜潮汹涌」的成长而成长，固定为最大值。
● 唤醒体「卡斯托尔」
    ○ 天赋「灵塑适性」：额外增加卡斯托尔对「提灯教会」敌人施加的「侵蚀」提高 20%~50%。
 
【战斗界面】
● 唤醒体「卡斯托尔」的衍生指令卡「黑羽」、唤醒体「血链·希洛」的指令卡「鲜血链条」现在初始计数会和即将打出次数匹配，显示为「1/3」而非「0/3」，且在第三次打出触发额外效果时会产生发光提示。

三、相位对弈
【全新内容】
● 唤醒体「波吕克斯」
    ○ 斗争职阶，生命 105。
    ○ 狂气爆发「无罪的圣裁」：消耗 100 点狂气。将「苦痛根源·知」、「灵魂枷锁·惑」、「毁灭信仰·执」各 1 张置入手牌。
    ○ 技能「光明之路」：算力消耗 3。触发全体敌方的罪印，回复等量伤害的生命。预备。 
    ○ 技能「无妄皈依」：算力消耗 1。对生命与护盾最高的敌方造成 5 伤害并施加等量罪印。预备。可以使用 3 次。 
    ○ 技能「亵渎圣心」：算力消耗 3。施加 5 罪印，损失 10 生命，幻影。
    ○ 衍生卡「苦痛根源·知」：算力消耗 2。造成 12 伤害，麻痹，中毒。触发全体敌方的罪印，损失 20 生命。预备。
    ○ 衍生卡「灵魂枷锁·惑」：算力消耗 2。易伤并虚弱目标，对其造成 10 伤害。触发全体敌方的罪印，损失 20 生命。预备。
    ○ 衍生卡「毁灭信仰·执」：算力消耗 2。驱散一名敌方的正面状态，对其造成 8 伤害，缠绕。触发全体敌方的罪印，损失 20 生命。预备。
    ○ 状态「罪印」：施加时失去等量层数的最大生命，触发时受到等量层数的被动伤害，永续。
● 命轮与钥令
    ○ 命轮「扭曲的骑士诗」：算力消耗 2。「技能」和回合结束时，对生命与护盾最高的敌方施加 2 层罪印。
    ○ 命轮「圣子尊容」：算力消耗 2。「技能」和回合结束时，对狂气最高的敌方造成 9 爆发封锁。
    ○ 钥令「泣血的圣心」：抽 1 张算力消耗最高的「技能」，使其获得预备。
 
【机制】
● 状态「石化」：现在统一变为昏迷。
● 状态「昏迷」：现在仅有附加伤害的昏迷效果会触发抗性并受到抗性影响。
 
【唤醒体】
● 卡斯托尔
    ○ 狂气爆发「不屈的孤嚎鸟」：强效从 2 降低为 1。
    ○ 衍生卡「黑羽」：伤害从 12 降低为 10。
● 阿格里帕
    ○ 技能「缚网绞杀」：算力消耗由 2 提高为 3。
● 艾尔瓦
    ○ 狂气爆发「无止境的正义」：伤害从 10 降低为 8。
    ○ 技能「防御姿态」：获得蓄力由 3 层降低为 2 层。
● 莉莉
    ○ 狂气爆发「淤泥上的不灭之花」：伤害从 30 提高为 35。
    ○ 技能「重塑疗愈」：回复生命由 15 提高为 20。
● 萨尔瓦多
    ○ 狂气爆发「造主的庇佑」：造成伤害由 25 降低为 20，但现在会额外获得屏障。
    ○ 技能「「惩恶」」：造成伤害由 9 降低为 8，每层伤害从 +3 变为提高为 +4。
    ○ 技能「神圣骨血」：造成伤害由 6 降低为 4。
    ○ 技能「「审判」」：造成伤害由 9 降低为 8。
● 希洛
    ○ 狂气爆发「绝境求生」：造成伤害由 15 提高为 20。
    ○ 技能「恨怨」：造成伤害由 5 提高为 8。
● 凯蒂古拉
    ○ 技能「万物终结」：算力消耗由 3 降低为 2。
    ○ 技能「告死魔弹」：效果调整为对生命与护盾最高的敌方造成 8 伤害，每消耗 1 点算力使伤害提高 8。
● 墨菲
    ○ 狂气爆发「虚妄继承者」：护盾从 20 降低为 18。
    ○ 技能「不屈的宣告」：伤害从 6 降低为 5。
● 卡茜亚
    ○ 技能「过手洗牌」：算力消耗由 1 提高为 2。
● 法洛思
    ○ 技能「逐火飞虫」：伤害从 4*算力上限 降低为 3*算力上限。
● 宁菲亚
    ○ 狂气爆发「自我的葬仪」：造成伤害由 10 降低为 8。
    ○ 技能「溺毒弥漫」：造成伤害由 6 降低为 5。
    ○ 技能「毒发」：算力消耗从 2 提高为 3。
    ○ 技能「海洋毒素」：算力消耗从 3 降低为 2，伤害从 12 降低为 8。
● 莉兹
    ○ 狂气爆发「告死之舞」：造成伤害由 40 提高为 48。
    ○ 技能「翠星坠落」：造成出血伤害由 15 提高为 16。

● 奥瑞塔
    ○ 狂气爆发「喧嚣海洋」：造成伤害由 8 提高为 12。
    ○ 技能「双向突刺」：造成伤害由 10 提高为 12，损失的生命由 10 提高为 12。
● 泰旖丝
    ○ 狂气爆发「丰壤之仪」：恢复生命从 40 降低为 35。
    ○ 技能「连绵的本能」：造成伤害由 12 降低为 10。
● 奥尔拉
    ○ 狂气爆发「哀恸浓墨」：不再获得强效。
    ○ 技能「死亡诗篇」：伤害从 8 降低为 7。
    ○ 技能「灵魂诗篇」：伤害从 8 降低为 7。
    ○ 技能「生命诗篇」：恢复生命从 25 降低为 20。
 
【命轮】
● 「搭档特训」：算力消耗由 3 提高为 5。
● 「隐秘的诞生」：算力消耗由 1 提高为 3 。
● 「勋爵手杖」：现在装备时会昏迷自身。
● 「谵妄」：现在装备时会昏迷自身。
● 「旋转，旋转」：算力消耗由 1 提高为 3。
● 「女王的戒律」：算力消耗由 3 提高为 4，最大生命降低从 5 提高为 10。
● 「记忆症候」： 获得算力效果从 3 降低为 2，移除保留算力效果。
● 「记忆螺旋」：算力消耗由 1 提高为 2，手牌上限从+3 降低为 +2。
● 「写实主义悖谬」：算力消耗由 2 提高为 4。
● 「狂乱」：算力消耗由 2 提高为 3。
● 「被缚的歌谣」：算力消耗由 0 提高为 1。
● 「死亡的剖析」：算力消耗由 2 提高为 3。
● 「引舵之帆」：算力消耗由 3 提高为 4。
● 「渴求的画笔」：现在每个其他友方每回合只能触发 1 次。
● 「快乐魔法秀」：算力消耗由 1 提高为 2。
● 「纯银的初心」：算力消耗由 1 提高为 2。
● 「隐世的转轮」：算力消耗由 4 提高为 5。
● 「青石王座」：算力消耗有 3 降低为 2。不再提高手牌上限。
● 「琥珀色的死亡」：算力消耗由 3 降低为 1。效果调整为「狂气爆发」后对所有敌人施加延迟：破绽。
● 「临界点」：算力消耗由 3 降低为 1。
● 「迫近的太阳」：算力消耗从 3 降低为 1。现在可以选择敌方目标。
● 「银鳕鱼的决心」：算力消耗从 0 提高为 1。效果调整为回合结束时，弃掉其他唤醒体的 1 张卡牌，然后抽 2 张牌。
● 「暴食」：额外使「打击」伤害提高 50%。
 
【钥令】
● 「海之祭」：不再使目标失去狂气。
● 「鼠鼠的智慧」：获得算力由 4 降低为 3。
● 「纯白初遇」：额外使算力上限-1。
● 「永世执念」：给予护盾由 25 降低为 15。
● 「短暂的永恒」：不再触发中毒，而是附加中毒。
● 「不灭的雷光」：效果调整为给予全体友方 1 层屏障。
● 「酒馆之门」：「莉雅的硬币」效果变为 3 算力并抽 3 张牌。
● 「春天的献诗」：选择的奇妙效果次数翻倍，算力和抽牌效果翻倍。
● 「虚无瘟疫」：延迟易伤效果变为立即效果。
● 「群星的庇佑」：效果调整为弃掉对方算力最高的 3 张牌，并使其获得等量「幻象」。
● 「蚀骨的拥抱」：算力上限满时不再额外抽牌。
● 「定格的仲夏留念」：抽牌数变化效果不再可以叠加，多次使用时仅叠加持续回合数。
● 「美梦一刹」：抽牌数变化效果不再可以叠加，多次使用时仅叠加持续回合数。

四、综合
【一般】
● 唤醒体「墨菲」的配音演员更换为「大内茜」，并新增了「繁衍狂热-墨菲」的配音。
● 唤醒体「皮克曼」的立绘风格调整得与其他唤醒体更加统一。
● 「典藏馆」中新增音乐专辑「神明诞生之日」、「疯画奇旅」、「献给春天的花束」、「畸变丰穰之种」、「狼的下周一」、「命运前奏之曲」、「永无乡假日」。
● 「手册-生涯成就」中补充了通关「异梦视界：再见永无乡」的成就。
● 「深潜纪录」和「对弈纪录」即将在V2.4更新中下架，届时将有全新的生涯奖励上线。入口处增加了结束倒计时显示，请有需要的守密人抓紧最后机会。
● 调查行动「星辰篇第三章」普通模式的关卡推荐等级从 63~64 上调为 65~66，困难模式的关卡推荐等级从 73~74 上调为 75~76，敌人实际强度没有变化。
● PC 中的「设置」新增了「查看文本标识」热键设置，启用后能更加便于翻译志愿者展开工作。
 
【队伍唯一】
● 密契 6 件套效果描述文本中「队伍唯一」现在修改为词缀，点击将弹出对应的效果说明提示。
● 当编队中有重复的密契 6 件套效果时，密契图标上方将有「！」标识提示。
● 此时开始调查弹出的「调查确认」提示中「队伍唯一」文字变为高亮蓝色作为强调显示。
 
【解锁条件】
● 各种「玩法活动」不再强制要求通关「调查行动-忘却篇 2-9」即可参与。
● 「幕间演习-融蚀之墟」现在只需要通关「调查行动-忘却篇1-2」就可以解锁。
● 「异梦视界：天边之外·上」的最佳体验提示由通关「调查行动-忘却篇第七章」调整为通关「调查行动-忘却篇终章」。
 
【本地化】
● 英文语言中，以下唤醒体的语音台词得到了人工翻译：「索蕾尔」，「血链·希洛」，「尤乌哈希」，「雷娅」,「24」，「达芙戴尔」。唤醒体「图鲁」在英语设置下的自称翻译得到了重新调整。
● 英文语言中，以下唤醒体的「繁衍狂欢」剧情得到了人工翻译：「墨菲」，「弥利亚姆」。
● 英文语言中，「调查行动」中标题、事件、战斗衍生卡牌的措辞得到了统一调整。
● 英文语言中，「唤醒」活动规则描述中「唤醒体残片」和「灵核碎片」翻译措辞更清晰了。
● 其他语言得到了第二批来自志愿者的翻译更新，详细内容将于官方Discord单独公告。再次感谢各位翻译志愿者的贡献！

五、问题修复
【一般】
● 修复了「繁衍狂欢-杜勒塞因」在1倍速自动播放剧情时，语音会被下一句提前打断的问题。
● 修复了部分守密人会在「活动」中错误地看到已关闭的「窥觑神国的阴影」活动的问题。
● 修复了「幻衣」头像在预览详情时，未能正确显示头像边框的问题。
● 修复了「编队」中设置的阵容有时候会意外清空的问题。
● 修复了「幻梦深潜」和「融灾禁区」排行榜中幻衣未显示的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」在预览收藏唤醒体的「狂气爆发」说明时，点击详情弹窗会错误关闭的问题。
● 修复了「相位对弈」中唤醒体「希洛」的技能「宣战」无法正确获得蓄力的问题。
 
【战斗】
● 修复了唤醒体「皮克曼」释放「灵知觉醒」后，在「灵感迸发」获得「创意」时没有正确获得胚胎融合度的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「宁菲亚」激活启灵 2 「无声浸润」后，手中同时存在多张唤醒体「宁菲亚」的指令卡「夜潮汹涌」时，打出症状卡后会根据张数错误的多次提高所有「夜潮汹涌」伤害效果的问题。
● 修复了「战斗」中钥令「群山的觉悟」能够错误抽取选择唤醒体的灵知觉醒和增益卡的问题。
● 修复了「战斗」中星辰篇造物「海眷歌谣」效果文本描述中存在错别字的问题。
● 修复了 PC 中「战斗」内选择选项时，可以按空格键错误跳过选择环节的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「杜勒赛因」在个别场景中释放「狂气爆发」镜头不正确的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「环行·拉蒙娜」的幻衣「幻梦假日」中动作模组表现不正确的问题。
● 修复了唤醒体「拉蒙娜」、「萝坦」、「朵尔」、「奥吉尔」狂气爆发音效触发时机有时不正确的问题。
 
【界面】
● 修复了「命轮」回溯中「叠位」可用时缺少红点提示的问题。
● 修复了「手册」界面右侧的奖励道具图标稀有度提示色错误变为白色的问题。
● 修复了「以银钥之名：守密人」等与守密人有关的头像显示获得数量错误的问题。
● 修复了「玩法活动」界面未正确展示怪物特性的问题。
● 修复了「冶炼室」界面中列表道具图标顶部未显示完整、装饰线会错误移动的问题。
● 修复了「编队」界面中界域筛选图标位置有时不正确的问题。
● 修复了获得大量「物资」时，数量过多时数字会错误换行的问题。
● 修复了「派遣」、「选择助战」界面右上角规则说明按钮样式不统一的问题。
● 修复了「唤醒详情」界面打开与拖动时严重卡顿的问题。
● 修复了部分语言设置下，「融灾禁区」界面中按钮文本错误换行与通关队伍文本错误重叠的问题。
● 修复了部分语言设置下，「敌人信息」界面中的故事文本错误截断、无法完整浏览的问题。
● 修复了部分语言设置下，「战斗探索」过程中部分「道具描述」文本错误截断、无法完整浏览的问题。
● 修复了部分语言设置下，唤醒体「环行·拉蒙娜」解锁时界面文本无法完整浏览的问题。
● 修复了「特遣记录」、「意识潜游」、「异梦视界」、「多维连接」界面左下方的故事描述无法拖动到最底部的问题，同时优化了文本过长时的显示范围、以便于守密人知晓可向下拖动查看。
● 修复了「唤醒体」查看立绘大图并挪动位置后，点击切换其他幻衣不会恢复默认位置的问题。

**V2.3.4.0 Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
Mythag University is scheduled to conduct campus facility maintenance from 08:00 to 11:00 on October 20 (UTC+8).
You can enter the game once the maintenance is complete. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
  
[Compensation]
Server Maintenance Compensation: Silver×200, Pure Core×5
  
[Claim Conditions]
The collection period ends on November 3, 2025 at 09:00. Please remember to check your mailbox in time to collect the supplies.
 
[Update Content]

2. Battle
[Awakener Enhancement]
● Awakener "Tawil"
    ○ Talent "Soulforge Aptitude": When Tawil plays a card originally belonging to other Awakeners in the team, the corresponding Awakener's Final DMG, Shield, and Healing for this turn are increased by 15%~25%, and this effect cannot be stacked.
● Awakener "Sorel"
    ○ Exalt "Carousel of Ambition": Base DMG hits increased from 5 to 6.
    ○ Elegance of Rose: Removes the limit of taking effect 1 additional time for 50% HP, increases the damage count from 2 to 4, and doubles HP Recovery.
    ○ Talent "Soulforge Aptitude": After Sorel "Devours", gain 15%~30% temporary ATK, triggering up to 5 times per turn.
● Awakener "Tinct"
    ○ Enlighten 1 "Stellar Reverberation": The Leap effect of Basic Strike is simplified to deal 1 additional damage, instead of changing to deal 1 instance of 3 times the damage.
    ○ Enlighten 2 "Midnight Elegy": The basic Defence Leap effect is simplified to deal an additional 1 Aliemus without reducing the Shield count.
    ○ Requiem: The Leap effect of Steal Strength is increased from 30% ATK to 35% ATK.
    ○ Talent "Soulforge Aptitude": After playing "Distant Melody," temporarily reduces the damage dealt by all "Humanoid" enemies by 10%~20%, not stackable. Each time "Requiem" dispels a negative state, gain 5~15 points of Aliemus.
● Awakener "Casiah"
    ○ Over-Exaltation "Unfettered Mirth": The effect of Strength gained is increased from 4% ATK to 8% ATK, but the number of Command Cards in effect is decreased from 10 to 5.
    ○ Telekinesis: Leap effect merged into base effect.
    ○ Enlighten 3 "Legendary Copycat": Redo, merging the original effect into the base effect. New effect: Telekinesis gains "Aftershock": Shuffle 1 "Insight" into the Draw Pile.

○ Talent "Soulforge Aptitude": At the start of the battle, if there are any "Beast" enemies, the Strength dealt by "Casiah" in this battle is increased by 15%~35%. After the first release of "All Disappear" each turn, trigger the Aftershock effect of shuffling cards into the Draw Pile.
● Awakener "Nymphaea"
    ○ Enlighten 2 "Silent Permeation": The bonus value from playing "Symptom" no longer grows with the development of "Midnight Tide" and is fixed at the maximum value.
● Awakener "Castor"
    ○ Talent "Soulforge Aptitude": Increases the "Corrosion" applied by Castor to enemies of the "Church of the Lightbearers" by an additional 20%~50%.

[Battle Interface]
● The derived Command Card "Onyx Plume" of Awakener "Castor" and the Command Card "Crimson Shackles" of Awakener "Helot: Catena" will now match the initial count with the upcoming play count, displaying as "1/3" instead of "0/3", and will produce a glowing hint when the extra effect is triggered on the third play.

3.Phase Traphase
[New Content]
● Awakener "Pollux"
    ○ Warborn Rank, HP 105.
    ○ Exalt "Sinless Verdict": Consumes 100 points of Aliemus. Add 1 each of "Maxim", "Folly", and "Craze" to your Hand.
    ○ Skill "Path of Radiance": Arithmetica Cost 3. Triggers Sin Marks for all enemies and restores HP equal to the damage dealt. Prepare
    ○ Skill "Faith Conversion": Arithmetica Cost 1. Deal 5 DMG to the enemy with the highest HP and Shield and apply an equal amount of Sin Mark. Prepare. Can be used 3 times
    ○ Skill "Defiled Heart": Arithmetica Cost 3. Apply 5 Sin Marks, lose 10 HP, Illusion.
    ○ Derived Card "Maxim": Arithmetica Cost 2. Deals 12 DMG, Paralysis, Poison. Triggers Sin Marks for all enemies, losing 20 HP. Prepare.
    ○ Derived Card "Folly": Arithmetica Cost 2. Vulnerable and Weakens the target, dealing 10 DMG. Triggers Sin Marks on all enemies, losing 20 HP. Prepare.
    ○ Derived Card "Destruction Faith: Craze": Arithmetica Cost 2. Dispel a positive state from one enemy, deal 8 DMG, and Entwined. Trigger Sin Marks for all enemies, losing 20 HP. Prepare.
    ○ State "Sin Mark": Lose an amount of Max HP equal to the stacks when applied, take passive damage equal to the stacks when triggered, Permanent.
● Wheel of Destiny and Posse
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "Twisted Knight Ballad": Arithmetica Cost 2. At the end of the turn, apply 2 stacks of Sin Mark to the enemy with the highest HP and Shield.
    ○ Wheel of Destiny "The Divu's Visage": Arithmetica Cost 2. At the end of the turn, inflict 9 Exalt Lock on the enemy with the highest Aliemus.
    ○ Posse "Sacred Bleeding Heart": Draw 1 Skill with the highest Arithmetica Cost and grant it Prepare.

[Mechanism]
● State "Petrify": Now unified into fainting.
● State "Fainted": Now only the additional damage from the fainting effect will trigger resistance and be affected by it.

[Awakener]
● Castor
    ○ Exalt "Dirge of the Unbroken": Amplification reduced from 2 to 1.
    ○ Derived Card "Onyx Plume": Damage reduced from 12 to 10.
● Agrippa
    ○ Skill "Web Strangulation": Arithmetica cost increases from 2 to 3.
● Alva
    ○ Exalt "Endless Justice": DMG decreased from 10 to 8.
    ○ Skill "Defensive Stance": Reduce Charge from 3 stacks to 2 stacks.

    ○ Exalt "Undying Flower Upon Slime": DMG increased from 30 to 35.
    ○ Skill "Reshape Healing": HP Recovery increased from 15 to 20.
● Salvador
    ○ Exalt "Creator's Blessing": Damage dealt is reduced from 25 to 20, but now an additional Barrier will be gained.
    ○ Skill "Devotion": Damage reduced from 9 to 8, with each stack of damage increasing from +3 to +4.
    ○ Skill "Sacred Bone Flesh": Damage dealt is reduced from 6 to 4.
    ○ Skill "Judgment": Damage reduced from 9 to 8.

    ○ Skill "Hatred and Resentment": Damage dealt increases from 5 to 8.

    ○ Skill "End of All Things": Arithmetica cost reduced from 3 to 2.

    ○ Exalt "Delusion's Heir": Shield reduced from 20 to 18.

● Casiah
    ○ Skill "Quickhand Shuffle": Arithmetica cost increased from 1 to 2.

    ○ Skill "Firefly": DMG is reduced from 4*Arithmetica Limit to 3*Arithmetica Limit.

    ○ Exalt "Passage of the Ego": Damage reduced from 10 to 8.
    ○ Skill "Toxic Miasma": Damage reduced from 6 to 5.
    ○ Skill "Poison Eruption": Arithmetica cost increases from 2 to 3.
    ○ Skill "Ocean Toxin": Arithmetica cost reduced from 3 to 2, DMG reduced from 12 to 8.
● Liz
    ○ Exalt "Dance to Destruction": Damage dealt is increased from 40 to 48.
    ○ Skill "Emerald Starfall": Increases Bleed damage from 15 to 16.
● Aurita
    ○ Exalt "Clamorous Ocean": Damage increased from 8 to 12.
    ○ Skill "Double Thrust": Damage increased from 10 to 12, life loss increased from 10 to 12.
● Thais
    ○ Exalt "Rite of Abundance": Restore HP reduced from 40 to 35.
    ○ Skill "Instinct of Continuity": Damage reduced from 12 to 10.
● Horla
    ○ Exalt "Grieving Ink": No longer gains Amplification.
    ○ Skill "Death Psalm": DMG is reduced from 8 to 7.
    ○ Skill "Soul Psalm": DMG reduced from 8 to 7.
    ○ Skill "Life Psalm": Restore HP from 25 to 20.

[Wheel of Destiny]
● "Partner Training": Arithmetica cost increased from 3 to 5.
● "Shrouded Birth": Arithmetica cost increased from 1 to 3.
● "Nobleman's Staff": Will cause you to faint when equipped.
● "Delirium": Will faint oneself when equipped now.
● "Fouetté": Arithmetica cost increases from 1 to 3.
● "Queen's Edict": Arithmetica cost increases from 3 to 4, max HP decreases from 5 to 10.
● "Memory Syndrome": Reduce the Arithmetica effect from 3 to 2, remove the Retain Arithmetica effect.
● "Memory Spiral": Arithmetica cost increases from 1 to 2, and Maximum Hand Size decreases from +3 to +2.
● "Paradoxical Realism": Arithmetica cost increased from 2 to 4.
● "Frenzy": Arithmetica cost increases from 2 to 3.

● "Song of the Bound": Arithmetica Cost increased from 0 to 1.
● "Analysis of Death": Arithmetica Cost increased from 2 to 3.
● "Sail of Providence": Arithmetica Cost increased from 3 to 4.
● "Thirsting Brush": Now each other ally can only trigger once per turn.
● "Happy Magic Show": Arithmetica Cost increased from 1 to 2.
● "Heart of Silver": Arithmetica Cost increased from 1 to 2.
● "Wheel Unseen": Arithmetica Cost increased from 4 to 5.
● "Blue Stone Throne": Arithmetica Cost decreased from 3 to 2. Maximum Hand Size is no longer increased.
● "Amber-Tinted Death": Arithmetica Cost reduced from 3 to 1. Effect adjusted to "Exalt" applies Delay: Falter to all enemies.
● "Critical Point": Arithmetica Cost reduced from 3 to 1.
● "Impending Sun": Arithmetica Cost reduced from 3 to 1. You can now choose an enemy target.
● "Silver Cod's Determination": Arithmetica Cost increases from 0 to 1. The effect is adjusted to discard 1 card from other Awakeners at the end of the turn, then draw 2 cards.
● "Gluttony": Increases "Strike" DMG by 50%.

[Posse]
● "Festival of Tides": No longer causes the target to lose Aliemus.
● "A Mouse's Wisdom": Reduce Arithmetica from 4 to 3.
● "Encounter in Pure White": Reduce Arithmetica Limit by an additional 1.
● "Obsession Eternal": Reduces the Shield granted from 25 to 15.
● "Ephemeral Eternity": No longer triggers Poison, but adds Poison instead.
● "Undying Thunder": Effect adjusted to grant all friendly units 1 stack of Barrier.

● "Tavern's Opening": The effect of "Leah's Coin" changes to 3 Arithmetica and draw 3 cards.
● "Spring's Verse": The number of selected Marvelous Effects is doubled, and Arithmetica and Draw effects are doubled.
● "Plague of Illusions": The delayed vulnerable effect is changed to an immediate effect.
● "Blessing of the Stars": Effect adjusted to discard the opponent's 3 cards with the highest Arithmetica and grant them an equivalent amount of "Illusion".
● "Bone-Chilling Embrace": No additional draws when the Arithmetica limit is full.
● "Beachside Memento": The effect of changing the number of draws can no longer be stacked; when used multiple times, it only stacks the duration of rounds.
● "A Fleeting Dream": The effect of changing the number of draws can no longer be stacked; when used multiple times, it only increases the duration of the effect.

IV. Comprehensive
[Normal]
● The voice actor for Awakener "Murphy" has been changed to "Dainei Qian," and a new voice for "Reproduction Frenzy - Murphy" has been added.
● The illustration style of the Awakener "Pickman" has been adjusted to be more uniform with other Awakeners.
● A new music album "Day of the Birth of God," "Crazy Painting Journey," "Bouquet for Spring," "Mutation of Abundant Seeds," "Wolf's Next Monday," "Prelude to Fate," "Neverland Holiday" has been added to the "Premium Hall."
● Added the achievement for clearing "Dreamscape: See You in Neverland" to the "Manual - Career Achievements."
● The "Deep Dive Record" and "Traphase Record" will be removed in the V2.4 update, and new career rewards will be launched at that time. A countdown display has been added at the entrance, so Keepers in need should seize the last opportunity.
● The recommended level for the "Investigation" stages in Chapter 3 of the Astral Reign on Normal mode has been raised from 63-64 to 65-66, and for Hard mode from 73-74 to 75-76. The actual strength of the enemies remains unchanged.
● The "Settings" in PC has added a "View Text Identifier" hotkey setting, which, when enabled, makes it easier for translation volunteers to carry out their work.

[Team Unique]
● The description text for the 6-piece Covenant set effect has been changed from "Team Unique" to Affix. Clicking will pop up the corresponding effect description hint.
● When there are 6 sets of duplicate Covenants in the lineup, a "!" icon will appear above the Covenant icon as a hint.
● At this time, the text "Team Unique" in the pop-up "Investigation Confirmed" prompt for starting the investigation changes to highlighted blue for emphasis.

[Unlock Conditions]
● Participation in various "Gameplay Events" no longer requires clearing "Investigation Operation - Faded Legacy 2-9."
● "Interlude - Dissolution Ruins" can now be unlocked by clearing "Investigation - Faded Legacy 1-2".
● The best experience tip for "Dreamscape: Beyond the Horizon: Part I" has been adjusted from clearing "Investigation - Faded Legacy Chapter 7" to clearing "Investigation - Faded Legacy Final Chapter."

[Localization]
● In English, the voice lines for the following Awakeners have been translated manually: "Sorel," "Chain: Helot," "Uvhash," "Leigh," "24," and "Dafdale." The self-reference translation for the Awakener "Tulu" has been readjusted in the English settings.
● In the English language, the following Awakener's "Reproduction Frenzy" story has been translated: "Murphy," "Miryam."
● In the English language, the wording of "Investigation Operation" titles, events, and battle-derived cards has been standardized.
● In the English language, the descriptions of the "Awaken" activity rules have clearer translations for "Awakener Fragments" and "Gnosis Fragments."
● The other languages have received a second batch of translation updates from volunteers, and detailed information will be announced separately on the official Discord. Thank you again to all the volunteer translators for their contributions!

5. Problem Fix
[Normal]
● Fixed the issue where the voice of "Frenzy - Doresain" would be interrupted by the next line during 1x speed automatic playback of the story.
● Fixed an issue where some Keepers incorrectly saw the closed "Glimpse Beyond Sanctum" event in the "Events" section.
● Fixed the issue where the "Phantom Garment" avatar did not display the avatar frame correctly in the preview details.
● Fixed the issue where the lineup set in "Lineup" would sometimes be unexpectedly cleared.
● Fixed the issue where the Phantom Garment did not display on the leaderboards for "Phantasmal Dive" and "D-Effect Zone."
● Fixed an issue where clicking the details popup would incorrectly close when previewing the "Exalt" description of the Awakeners in "Traphase" collection.
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Helot" could not correctly gain Charge for the skill "War Declaration" in "Traphase".

[Battle]
● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Pickman" did not correctly gain Fusion Level when releasing "Rouse" and obtaining "Creativity" during "Inspiration Surge."
● Fixed an issue where activating Enlighten 2 "Silent Permeation" with multiple Command Cards of the Awakener "Nymphaea" in hand would incorrectly increase the damage effect of all "Midnight Tide" cards multiple times based on the number of cards when playing a Symptom Card.
● Fixed the issue where the Posse "The Mountains' Resolve" could incorrectly draw and select the Awakener's Gnosis Rouse and enhancement cards in the Battle.
● Fixed a typo in the effect text description of the Relic "Chant of the Tides" in the battle of Astral Reign.
● Fixed the issue in PC where pressing the space bar could incorrectly skip the selection phase when choosing options in "Battle."

● Fixed the issue where the Awakener "Doresain" released the "Exalt" cutscene incorrectly in certain scenarios.
● Fixed the issue with the action module not performing correctly in the Phantom Garment "Dreamy Vacation" for the Awakener "Ramona: Timeworn."
● Fixed the issue where the Exalt sound effects for the Awakeners "Ramona," "Lotan," "Doll," and "Ogier" were sometimes triggered incorrectly.

[Interface]
● Fixed the issue where the hint red dot was missing when "Ascension" was available in the "Wheel of Destiny" rewind.
● Fixed the issue where the rarity hint color of the reward item icons on the right side of the "Manual" interface was incorrectly displayed as white.
● Fixed the issue of incorrect display of the quantity obtained for avatars related to "By the Silver Key: Keeper" and other Keeper-related items.
● Fixed the issue where the "Gameplay Activity" interface did not correctly display monster characteristics.
● Fixed the issue where the item icons at the top of the list in the "Alchemy" interface were not fully displayed, and the decorative lines moved incorrectly.
● Fixed the issue where the Realm filter icon position was sometimes incorrect in the Lineup interface.
● Fixed the issue where the number would incorrectly wrap when obtaining a large amount of "resources."
● Fixed the issue of inconsistent styles for the rules explanation button in the upper right corner of the "Assignment" and "Select Support" interfaces.

● Fixed the severe lag issue when opening and dragging the "Awakening Details" interface.
● Fixed the issue of incorrect button text wrapping and overlapping with the clear team text in the "D-Effect Zone" interface under some language settings.
● Fixed an issue where story text was truncated and could not be fully viewed in the "Enemy Information" interface under certain language settings.
● Fixed the issue where some "item description" texts were truncated and could not be fully viewed during "Battle Exploration" under certain language settings.
● Fixed an issue where the interface text could not be fully viewed when unlocking the Awakener "Ramona: Timeworn" under certain language settings.
● Fixed the issue where the story description at the bottom left of the "Special Operation," "Psyche Deepdive," "Dreamscape," and "Multidimensional Link" interfaces could not be dragged to the bottom. Also optimized the display range for long texts to help the Keeper know they can scroll down to view more.
● Fixed the issue where clicking to switch to other Phantom Garments after viewing the full illustration of the "Awakener" and moving its position would not restore the default position.
